---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behaviour (especially a wrong fairness number)
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug. If a metric looks wrong, include the inputs and the value you
expected (and how you computed it — e.g. Fairlearn, by hand).

**To reproduce**
Minimal code or steps. A failing test is ideal.

**Environment**
- OS / Python version:
- EthicLens commit:

**Additional context**
Anything else (logs, screenshots, dataset shape).
